global_description: A medium-sized bird with a robust body, large head, and long pointed bill. It features a striking blue-gray plumage with a distinctive rusty orange band across the chest and belly. The wings and back are darker blue-gray, while the throat and collar are white.

part_details.head: Large, blue-gray with a white collar and a long pointed bill.
part_details.chest: Rusty orange band across the chest and belly.
part_details.throat: White, contrasting with the darker head and chest.
part_details.bill: Long, pointed, and dark, suited for fishing.

spatial_relations: The white collar encircles the base of the head.
The rusty orange band covers the chest and extends to the belly.
The long bill protrudes from the front of the head.
